name: Active Contracts
description: This dataset contains active City contracts as of April 10th, 2024. The following are the contract types: franch = Franchise Agreements, grants = City Grants, graphic&pr = Graphic Artist, lease = Leasing Agreement, m-donate = Memorandum of Understanding, m-mou = Memorandum of Understanding, profsvcs = Professional & Contract Services, pworks = Public Works & Construction, recreation = Recreation Services, specevents = Special Event Related Services, and web/tech = Information Technology Related

columns.name: Average
columns.description: Average buyout amount received, by unit size and overall.

columns.name: Unit Size
columns.description: Number of bedrooms of the unit subject to the buyout.

columns.name: Notes of Interest
columns.description: Noteworthy stipulations particular to the agreement.

columns.name: Buyout Amount
columns.description: Agreed upon amount provided to the tenant by the landlord for vacating the premises.

columns.name: Execution Date
columns.description: Date the agreement was signed off on by both, tenant and landlord.

columns.name: Address
columns.description: Address at which the buyout took place.

name: Budget Expenditure Detail FY15 - 18
description: This dataset contains the line-item detail for the 2015-18 expenditure budget

name: City of West Hollywood Catalogue of Enterprise Systems
description: SB 272 requires that local agencies create a catalogue of enterprise systems used and that information be made publicly available on the agency’s website. This dataset serves as a repository of such data and will be updated annually.

name: Citywide Traffic Volumes
description: One of the City's ongoing strategic programs is to control traffic volumes, decrease traffic speeds and create safer walking and bicycling conditions. In an effort to do this, the City regularly surveys traffic conditions. This dataset contains the City's most recent traffic volume data.

name: West Hollywood Visual Survey of Properties Subject to the Seismic Retrofit Ordinances
description: Welcome to the West Hollywood Seismic Retrofit open data portal. Buildings subject the City's Seismic Retrofit Ordinances can be found on this page. Addresses may be looked up individually or a list of all properties subject to the ordinances is also available with the ability to filter the information in various ways. name: City Tree Inventory
description: This is an inventory of all City-managed trees within West Hollywood.

name: Active/Upcoming Extended Hours Construction Permits

columns.name: West Hollywood Census Tracts
columns.description: This column was automatically created in order to record in what polygon from the dataset 'West Hollywood Census Tracts' (kaxf-j9p4) the point in column 'address' is located. This enables the creation of region maps (choropleths) in the visualization canvas and data lens.

This enables the creation of region maps (choropleths) in the visualization canvas and data lens.

description: A list of active extended hours construction permits within the City.
